OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The scope of the connector, e.g. 'flashpoint'.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

FORTISIEM_INCIDENTS_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the FortiSIEM Supervisor (e.g. https://fortisiem.example.com).

FORTISIEM_INCIDENTS_ORGANIZATION.description: FortiSIEM organization used to scope the REST API user (e.g. 'super').

FORTISIEM_INCIDENTS_IMPORT_WINDOW_DAYS.description: Number of days of incidents to import on the first run.

FORTISIEM_INCIDENTS_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking applied to the imported incidents.

FORTISIEM_INCIDENTS_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the FortiSIEM Supervisor.
